connection.note: sample family — runs on typed sample rows offline

dataAccesses.name: Cover crop % by county (multi-provider)
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT county_fips, provider, year, pct FROM cover_crop_estimates

dataAccesses.name: Conservation tillage % by county
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT county_fips, practice, pct FROM tillage_estimates

dataAccesses.name: Practice adoption trend (per provider)
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT year, provider, pct FROM practice_adoption_trend

dataAccesses.name: Practice adoption by state
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT state, practice, pct FROM state_practice_adoption

dataAccesses.name: Cover crop % by USDA district (CRD)
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT district, year, pct FROM crd_cover_crop

dataAccesses.name: Cover % by watershed (HUC8)
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT huc8, pct FROM watershed_cover

dataAccesses.name: Yield by county and crop
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT county_fips, crop, bu_per_acre FROM county_yield

dataAccesses.name: Acres by county and practice
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT county_fips, practice, acres FROM practice_acres

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT SUM(s.entity_count) AS total_assets, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS governed_pct, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS completeness_pct, ROUND(SUM(st.size_bytes)/1e12::numeric,1) AS total_tb, ROUND(SUM(st.monthly_cost_usd)::numeric,0) AS monthly_cost FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN entity_storage_demo st ON s.entity_key=st.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds}

dataAccesses.name: Pipeline
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(terminal_count),0),1) AS success_pct, SUM(started_count) AS runs FROM fact_lineage_event

dataAccesses.name: Lineage
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT SUM(restricted_to_ungoverned_count) AS restricted_ungov FROM fact_lineage_connection

dataAccesses.name: StorageBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(size_bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb, count(*) AS assets FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: Governance
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(regexp_replace(s.governance_coverage_status,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),''),'Unknown') AS status, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: Sensitivity
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sens, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: Freshness
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(regexp_replace(s.scan_freshness_band,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),''),'Unknown') AS band, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: CompletenessBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: SourceScorecard
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, count(*) AS assets, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS gov_pct, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS comp_pct, ROUND(SUM(st.size_bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN entity_storage_demo st ON s.entity_key=st.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC NULLS LAST

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(monthly_cost_usd)::numeric,0) AS monthly, ROUND(SUM(monthly_cost_usd)*12::numeric,0) AS annual, ROUND(SUM(co2e_kg)/1000::numeric,1) AS co2e_tonnes, ROUND(SUM(monthly_cost_usd*dup_savings_bytes/NULLIF(size_bytes,0))::numeric,0) AS reclaimable FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: CostBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(monthly_cost_usd)::numeric,0) AS cost FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: CostBySens
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT sensitivity AS sens, ROUND(SUM(monthly_cost_usd)::numeric,0) AS cost FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: Co2eBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(co2e_kg)/1000::numeric,2) AS tonnes FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: ReclaimBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(monthly_cost_usd*dup_savings_bytes/NULLIF(size_bytes,0))::numeric,0) AS cost FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(dup_savings_bytes)>0 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: CostTrend
dataAccesses.sql: WITH first_scan AS ( SELECT s.entity_key, MIN(d.year_month_number) AS ym, MIN(d.year_month_name) AS ymn FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date d ON s.scanned_date_key=d.date_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1) SELECT fs.ymn AS month, ROUND(SUM(st.monthly_cost_usd)::numeric,0) AS cost, ROUND(SUM(SUM(st.monthly_cost_usd)) OVER (ORDER BY fs.ym)::numeric,0) AS cum_cost FROM entity_storage_demo st JOIN first_scan fs ON st.entity_key=fs.entity_key WHERE st.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(st.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY fs.ym, fs.ymn ORDER BY fs.ym

dataAccesses.name: DetailCosted
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, st.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(st.monthly_cost_usd::numeric,2) AS monthly_usd, ROUND(st.size_bytes/1e9::numeric,2) AS gb, ROUND(st.co2e_kg::numeric,1) AS co2e_kg, COALESCE(NULLIF(st.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(st.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM entity_storage_demo st JOIN dim_entity e ON st.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE st.datasource_type LIKE ${src} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(st.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY st.monthly_cost_usd DESC

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Sensitivities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS s FROM entity_storage_demo ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS completeness_pct, SUM(s.missing_owner_count) AS missing_owner, SUM(s.missing_created_date_count)+SUM(s.missing_modified_date_count)+SUM(s.missing_accessed_date_count) AS missing_dates FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: Profiled
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.data_profile_status,''),'Not Profiled') AS status, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: CompletenessBand
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(s.metadata_completeness_band,''),'Unknown') AS band, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: CompletenessBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: MissingAttrs
dataAccesses.sql: WITH s AS (SELECT fes.* FROM fact_entity_snapshot fes JOIN dim_datasource d ON fes.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON fes.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}) SELECT 'Owner' AS attr, SUM(missing_owner_count) AS cnt FROM s UNION ALL SELECT 'Group', SUM(missing_group_count) FROM s UNION ALL SELECT 'File Type', SUM(missing_filetype_count) FROM s UNION ALL SELECT 'Path', SUM(missing_path_count) FROM s UNION ALL SELECT 'Created Date', SUM(missing_created_date_count) FROM s UNION ALL SELECT 'Modified Date', SUM(missing_modified_date_count) FROM s UNION ALL SELECT 'Accessed Date', SUM(missing_accessed_date_count) FROM s ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: QualityScatter
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS comp_pct, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS gov_pct, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(s.entity_count)>0 ORDER BY 4 DESC

dataAccesses.name: WorstEntities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.entity_name AS entity, COALESCE(NULLIF(d.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count) AS expected, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS complete_pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1,2 HAVING SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count) >= 5 ORDER BY complete_pct ASC, expected DESC LIMIT 15

dataAccesses.name: DetailByBand
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, d.datasource_type AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(s.metadata_completeness_band,''),'Unknown') AS band, s.metadata_completed_field_count AS completed, s.metadata_expected_field_count AS expected, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(s.metadata_completeness_band,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${band} AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY s.metadata_completed_field_count ASC, e.entity_name

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Sensitivities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS s FROM dim_entity ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT SUM(e.started_count) AS runs, ROUND(100.0*SUM(e.completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(e.terminal_count),0),1) AS success_pct, SUM(e.failed_count)+SUM(e.aborted_count) AS failures, ROUND(SUM(e.output_bytes)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb, COUNT(DISTINCT j.job_name) AS jobs FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey}

dataAccesses.name: SuccessTrend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', s.event_date),'YYYY-MM') AS month, ROUND(100.0*SUM(e.completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(e.terminal_count),0),1) AS success_pct, SUM(e.started_count) AS runs FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN v_stg_lineage_event s ON e.lineage_event_nk = md5(lower(trim(s.event_nk))) JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND s.event_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: ByIntegration
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT j.integration AS integ, ROUND(100.0*SUM(e.completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(e.terminal_count),0),1) AS success_pct, SUM(e.failed_count)+SUM(e.aborted_count) AS failures, SUM(e.started_count) AS runs FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND j.integration<>'Unknown' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 4 DESC

dataAccesses.name: FailuresByJob
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT j.job_name AS job, SUM(e.failed_count)+SUM(e.aborted_count) AS failures FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(e.failed_count)+SUM(e.aborted_count) > 0 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 15

dataAccesses.name: JobTopology
dataAccesses.sql: WITH jf AS ( SELECT lineage_job_key, SUM(failed_count)+SUM(aborted_count) AS fails FROM fact_lineage_event GROUP BY 1 ), top AS ( SELECT c.lineage_job_key, SUM(c.bytes_moved) AS tb FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON j.lineage_job_key=c.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND c.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND c.event_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY tb DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 14 ) SELECT j.job_name AS job, regexp_replace(c.dest_namespace,'^([a-z0-9]+)://.*','\1') AS dest, SUM(c.bytes_moved) AS bytes, COUNT(*) AS conns, COALESCE(jf.fails,0) AS fails FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN top ON top.lineage_job_key=c.lineage_job_key JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON j.lineage_job_key=c.lineage_job_key LEFT JOIN jf ON jf.lineage_job_key=c.lineage_job_key WHERE c.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND c.event_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY j.job_name, dest, jf.fails ORDER BY bytes DESC

dataAccesses.name: Lifecycle
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT et.event_type_label AS type, SUM(e.event_count) AS events FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_event_type et ON e.event_type_key=et.event_type_key JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: RunVolume
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', s.event_date),'YYYY-MM') AS month, SUM(e.started_count) AS runs FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN v_stg_lineage_event s ON e.lineage_event_nk = md5(lower(trim(s.event_nk))) JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND s.event_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: RunCalendar
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(d.full_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS day, SUM(e.event_count) AS events, SUM(e.started_count) AS runs, SUM(e.failed_count)+SUM(e.aborted_count) AS fails FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key JOIN dim_date d ON e.event_date_key=d.date_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} AND e.event_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Slowest
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT view_name AS job, ROUND(AVG(runtime_seconds)::numeric,1) AS avg_secs, SUM(run_count) AS runs, ROUND(100.0*SUM(success_count)/NULLIF(SUM(run_count),0),1) AS success_pct FROM fact_pipeline_run GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: DetailFailedRuns
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.run_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(et.event_type_label,''),'(event)') AS event, e.event_date_key AS day, j.integration AS integration, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.out_namespace,''),NULLIF(e.in_namespace,''),'—') AS namespace, e.record_count AS records FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key LEFT JOIN dim_lineage_event_type et ON e.event_type_key=et.event_type_key WHERE j.job_name LIKE ${job} AND (e.failed_count>0 OR e.aborted_count>0) AND j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} ORDER BY e.event_date_key DESC, e.run_id

dataAccesses.name: Integrations
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT integration FROM dim_lineage_job WHERE integration NOT IN ('Unknown') ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: ScanCalendar
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(dt.full_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS day, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets, SUM(s.governed_entity_count) AS governed FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key JOIN dim_date dt ON s.scanned_date_key=dt.date_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} AND s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.entity_count) FILTER (WHERE s.scan_freshness_band ILIKE '%stale%')/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS stale_pct, ROUND(AVG(s.accessed_age_months)::numeric,1) AS avg_access_age, SUM(s.entity_count) FILTER (WHERE s.accessed_age_months >= 24) AS cold_assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: ScanFresh
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(s.scan_freshness_band,''),'Unknown') AS band, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: AccessedAge
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(s.accessed_age_band,''),'Unknown') AS band, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: ModifiedAge
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(s.modified_age_band,''),'Unknown') AS band, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Temperature
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT t.temperature_name AS temp, SUM(f.file_count) AS files FROM fact_temperature_daily f JOIN dim_temperature t ON f.temperature_key=t.temperature_key WHERE f.snapshot_date_key=(SELECT MAX(snapshot_date_key) FROM fact_temperature_daily) GROUP BY t.temperature_name, t.temperature_sort ORDER BY t.temperature_sort

dataAccesses.name: StaleBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.entity_count) FILTER (WHERE s.scan_freshness_band ILIKE '%stale%' OR s.scan_freshness_band ILIKE '%aging%')/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS stale_pct, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC NULLS LAST

dataAccesses.name: TempTrend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(to_date(f.snapshot_date_key::text,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM') AS month, SUM(f.file_count) FILTER (WHERE t.temperature_name ILIKE '%cold%' OR t.temperature_name ILIKE '%frozen%') AS cold, SUM(f.file_count) FILTER (WHERE t.temperature_name ILIKE '%hot%' OR t.temperature_name ILIKE '%warm%') AS hotwarm FROM fact_temperature_daily f JOIN dim_temperature t ON f.temperature_key=t.temperature_key WHERE f.snapshot_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: DetailByFreshBand
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, d.datasource_type AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(s.scan_freshness_band,''),'Unknown') AS scan_band, COALESCE(NULLIF(s.accessed_age_band,''),'—') AS access_age, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(s.scan_freshness_band,''),'Unknown') LIKE ${band} AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY e.entity_name

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Sensitivities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS s FROM dim_entity ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS governed_pct, SUM(s.governed_entity_count) AS governed, SUM(s.ungoverned_entity_count) AS ungoverned, (SELECT SUM(assignment_count) FROM fact_entity_policy) AS assignments FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: GovStatus
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(regexp_replace(s.governance_coverage_status,'^[0-9]+\.\s*',''),''),'Unknown') AS status, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: GovBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS gov_pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: UngovBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, SUM(s.ungoverned_entity_count) AS ungoverned FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: TopPolicies
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT p.policy_name AS policy, SUM(f.assignment_count) AS assigns FROM fact_entity_policy f JOIN dim_policy p ON f.policy_key=p.policy_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 15

dataAccesses.name: PolicyNetwork
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT p.policy_name AS policy, d.datasource_type AS src, SUM(f.assignment_count) AS assigns FROM fact_entity_policy f JOIN dim_policy p ON f.policy_key=p.policy_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1,2 HAVING SUM(f.assignment_count) > 0 ORDER BY assigns DESC

dataAccesses.name: PolicyType
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(p.policy_type,''),'unknown') AS ptype, SUM(f.assignment_count) AS assigns FROM fact_entity_policy f JOIN dim_policy p ON f.policy_key=p.policy_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: Trend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.year_month_name AS month, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS governed_pct, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS complete_pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date d ON s.scanned_date_key=d.date_key JOIN dim_datasource dd ON s.datasource_key=dd.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 AND dd.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY d.year_month_name, d.year_month_number ORDER BY d.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: DetailUngoverned
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, d.datasource_type AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(s.governance_coverage_status,''),'Ungoverned') AS status, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE s.ungoverned_entity_count=1 AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${src} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') DESC, e.entity_name

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Sensitivities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS s FROM dim_entity ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(size_bytes)/1e12::numeric,1) AS total_tb, count(*) AS assets, ROUND(AVG(size_bytes)/1e9::numeric,2) AS avg_gb, ROUND(MAX(size_bytes)/1e9::numeric,1) AS max_gb FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: BySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT datasource_type AS src, ROUND(SUM(size_bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb, count(*) AS assets FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: ByResType
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT resource_type AS rt, ROUND(SUM(size_bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: SizeDist
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT band, count(*) AS assets FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN size_bytes<1e9 THEN '1. <1 GB' WHEN size_bytes<1e10 THEN '2. 1-10 GB' WHEN size_bytes<1e11 THEN '3. 10-100 GB' WHEN size_bytes<1e12 THEN '4. 100GB-1TB' ELSE '5. 1 TB+' END AS band FROM entity_storage_demo WHERE datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}) t GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: TopAssets
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, st.datasource_type AS src, st.resource_type AS rt, ROUND(st.size_bytes/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM entity_storage_demo st JOIN dim_entity e ON st.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE st.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(st.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY st.size_bytes DESC LIMIT 14

dataAccesses.name: Growth
dataAccesses.sql: WITH first_scan AS ( SELECT s.entity_key, MIN(d.year_month_number) AS ym, MIN(d.year_month_name) AS ymn FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date d ON s.scanned_date_key=d.date_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1) SELECT fs.ymn AS month, ROUND(SUM(st.size_bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb, ROUND(SUM(SUM(st.size_bytes)) OVER (ORDER BY fs.ym)/1e12::numeric,2) AS cum_tb FROM entity_storage_demo st JOIN first_scan fs ON st.entity_key=fs.entity_key WHERE st.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(st.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY fs.ym, fs.ymn ORDER BY fs.ym

dataAccesses.name: DetailAssets
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, st.datasource_type AS src, st.resource_type AS restype, ROUND(st.size_bytes/1e9::numeric,2) AS gb, COALESCE(NULLIF(st.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(st.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM entity_storage_demo st JOIN dim_entity e ON st.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE st.datasource_type LIKE ${src} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(st.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY st.size_bytes DESC

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: Sensitivities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS s FROM entity_storage_demo ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: K
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT count(DISTINCT f.application_key) AS apps, SUM(f.access_count) AS accesses, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS assets, ROUND(SUM(st.size_bytes)/1e12::numeric,1) AS tb FROM fact_entity_application f JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN entity_storage_demo st ON f.entity_key=st.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens}

dataAccesses.name: A
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT a.application_name AS app, SUM(f.access_count) AS acc FROM fact_entity_application f JOIN dim_application a ON f.application_key=a.application_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 14

dataAccesses.name: T
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(a.application_type,''),'unknown') AS atype, SUM(f.access_count) AS acc FROM fact_entity_application f JOIN dim_application a ON f.application_key=a.application_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: S
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, SUM(f.access_count) AS acc FROM fact_entity_application f JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: R
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT a.application_name AS app, SUM(f.access_count) AS acc, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS assets, ROUND(SUM(st.size_bytes)/1e12::numeric,2) AS tb FROM fact_entity_application f JOIN dim_application a ON f.application_key=a.application_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN entity_storage_demo st ON f.entity_key=st.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 14

dataAccesses.name: ASF
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT a.application_name AS app, COALESCE(NULLIF(d.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, SUM(f.access_count) AS acc FROM fact_entity_application f JOIN dim_application a ON f.application_key=a.application_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} GROUP BY 1,2 HAVING SUM(f.access_count)>0 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 30

dataAccesses.name: DetailAppEntities
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.entity_name,''),'(unnamed)') AS name, d.datasource_type AS src, f.access_count AS accesses, ROUND(f.accessed_size_tb*1000::numeric,2) AS accessed_gb, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COALESCE(NULLIF(e.owner_name,''),'—') AS owner FROM fact_entity_application f JOIN dim_application a ON f.application_key=a.application_key JOIN dim_datasource d ON f.datasource_key=d.datasource_key LEFT JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key WHERE a.application_name LIKE ${app} AND d.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} AND COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') LIKE ${sens} ORDER BY f.access_count DESC

dataAccesses.name: DS
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: SENS
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS s FROM dim_entity ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT SUM(s.entity_count) AS total_assets, count(DISTINCT s.scanned_date_key) FILTER (WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101) AS scan_days, count(DISTINCT s.datasource_key) AS sources, SUM(s.entity_count) FILTER (WHERE s.scanned_date_key >= to_char(current_date-90,'YYYYMMDD')::int) AS last90 FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource dd ON s.datasource_key=dd.datasource_key WHERE dd.datasource_type LIKE ${ds}

dataAccesses.name: TrendCum
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.year_month_name AS month, SUM(SUM(s.entity_count)) OVER (ORDER BY d.year_month_number) AS cumulative FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date d ON s.scanned_date_key=d.date_key JOIN dim_datasource dd ON s.datasource_key=dd.datasource_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 AND dd.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY d.year_month_name, d.year_month_number ORDER BY d.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: ByMonth
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.year_month_name AS month, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date d ON s.scanned_date_key=d.date_key JOIN dim_datasource dd ON s.datasource_key=dd.datasource_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 AND dd.datasource_type LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY d.year_month_name, d.year_month_number ORDER BY d.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: BySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(dd.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource dd ON s.datasource_key=dd.datasource_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: Recent
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.entity_name AS name, COALESCE(NULLIF(dd.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, d.full_date AS scan_date FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key JOIN dim_date d ON s.scanned_date_key=d.date_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON s.datasource_key=dd.datasource_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 AND COALESCE(dd.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} ORDER BY s.scanned_date_key DESC LIMIT 16

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All sources' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type AS v, datasource_type AS l, 1 AS ord FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY ord, l

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT (SELECT count(DISTINCT integration) FROM dim_lineage_job WHERE integration<>'Unknown') AS integrations, SUM(e.started_count) AS runs, ROUND(100.0*SUM(e.completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(e.terminal_count),0),1) AS success_pct, ROUND(SUM(e.output_bytes)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb, (SELECT SUM(restricted_to_ungoverned_count) FROM fact_lineage_connection) AS restricted_ungov FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND j.integration<>'Unknown' AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey}

dataAccesses.name: GBI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT j.integration AS integ, ROUND(SUM(e.output_bytes)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration<>'Unknown' AND j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: SBI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT j.integration AS integ, ROUND(100.0*SUM(e.completed_count)/NULLIF(SUM(e.terminal_count),0),1) AS success_pct FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration<>'Unknown' AND j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: SM
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT 'Completed' AS status, SUM(e.completed_count) AS runs FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration<>'Unknown' AND j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} UNION ALL SELECT 'Failed / Aborted' AS status, GREATEST(SUM(e.terminal_count)-SUM(e.completed_count),0) AS runs FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration<>'Unknown' AND j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey}

dataAccesses.name: T
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', s.event_date),'YYYY-MM') AS month, ROUND(SUM(e.output_bytes)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb FROM fact_lineage_event e JOIN v_stg_lineage_event s ON e.lineage_event_nk = md5(lower(trim(s.event_nk))) JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON e.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND s.event_date IS NOT NULL AND e.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: TF
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT j.integration AS integ, c.orig_namespace||' → '||c.dest_namespace AS flow, ROUND(SUM(c.bytes_moved)/1e9::numeric,1) AS gb, SUM(c.connection_count) AS conns FROM fact_lineage_connection c JOIN dim_lineage_job j ON c.lineage_job_key=j.lineage_job_key WHERE j.integration LIKE ${integration} AND c.event_date_key >= ${fromkey} GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 18

dataAccesses.name: R
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT 0 AS v, 'All time' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT to_char(current_date-365,'YYYYMMDD')::int, 'Last 12 months', 1 UNION ALL SELECT to_char(current_date-180,'YYYYMMDD')::int, 'Last 6 months', 2 UNION ALL SELECT to_char(current_date-90,'YYYYMMDD')::int, 'Last 90 days', 3 ORDER BY ord

dataAccesses.name: I
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All integrations' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT integration AS v, integration AS l, 1 AS ord FROM dim_lineage_job WHERE integration NOT IN ('Unknown') ORDER BY ord, l

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: WITH priv AS ( SELECT DISTINCT f.entity_key, COALESCE(NULLIF(g.leaf_name,''),g.term_name) AS term, e.sensitivity FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' AND COALESCE(dd.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds}) SELECT count(DISTINCT entity_key) AS priv_assets, count(DISTINCT term) AS terms, count(DISTINCT entity_key) FILTER (WHERE sensitivity IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM')) AS elevated, count(DISTINCT entity_key) FILTER (WHERE sensitivity='HIGH') AS high FROM priv

dataAccesses.name: ByTerm
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(g.leaf_name,''),g.term_name) AS term, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' AND COALESCE(dd.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: Scale
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.sensitivity AS s, count(*) AS n FROM dim_entity e LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE e.sensitivity IN ('LOW','MEDIUM','HIGH') AND COALESCE(dd.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} GROUP BY 1

dataAccesses.name: BySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(dd.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: HeatStacked
dataAccesses.sql: WITH tt AS ( SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(g.leaf_name,''),g.term_name) AS term, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS n FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 8) SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(dd.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, COALESCE(NULLIF(g.leaf_name,''),g.term_name) AS term, count(DISTINCT f.entity_key) AS entities FROM fact_entity_term f JOIN dim_glossary_term g ON f.glossary_term_key=g.glossary_term_key JOIN dim_entity e ON f.entity_key=e.entity_key LEFT JOIN dim_datasource dd ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=dd.datasource_key WHERE lower(g.term_name||' '||COALESCE(g.leaf_name,'')) ~ '(pii|restrict|classif|sensitive|confidential|gdpr|hipaa|pci|phi|secret|personal)' AND COALESCE(NULLIF(g.leaf_name,''),g.term_name) IN (SELECT term FROM tt) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All sources' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type AS v, datasource_type AS l, 1 AS ord FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY ord, l

dataAccesses.name: KPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.resource_type='Structured') AS structured_assets, count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='TABLE') AS tables, count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='COLUMN') AS columns, count(DISTINCT e.structured_schema) FILTER (WHERE e.structured_schema NOT IN ('','Unknown')) AS schemas FROM dim_entity e LEFT JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE COALESCE(d.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds}

dataAccesses.name: ByType
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.entity_type AS etype, count(*) AS n FROM dim_entity e LEFT JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE COALESCE(d.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND e.entity_type IS NOT NULL AND e.entity_type<>'' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: DataTypes
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT upper(e.column_data_type) AS dt, count(*) AS n FROM dim_entity e LEFT JOIN dim_datasource d ON md5(e.datasource_nk)=d.datasource_key WHERE COALESCE(d.datasource_type,'') LIKE ${ds} AND e.column_data_type IS NOT NULL AND e.column_data_type<>'' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: Keys
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT 'Primary Key' AS k, count(*) AS n FROM dim_entity WHERE is_primary_key UNION ALL SELECT 'Foreign Key', count(*) FROM dim_entity WHERE is_foreign_key UNION ALL SELECT 'Other Columns', count(*) FROM dim_entity WHERE entity_type='COLUMN' AND NOT COALESCE(is_primary_key,false) AND NOT COALESCE(is_foreign_key,false)

dataAccesses.name: SchemasByCols
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.structured_schema AS schema, count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='COLUMN') AS cols FROM dim_entity e WHERE e.structured_schema NOT IN ('','Unknown') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: TopSchemas
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT e.structured_schema AS schema, count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='COLUMN') AS cols, count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.entity_type='TABLE') AS tables FROM dim_entity e WHERE e.structured_schema NOT IN ('','Unknown') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

dataAccesses.name: DataSources
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT '%' AS v, 'All sources' AS l, 0 AS ord UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT datasource_type AS v, datasource_type AS l, 1 AS ord FROM dim_datasource WHERE datasource_type IS NOT NULL AND datasource_type<>'' ORDER BY ord, l
